core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Industrial utility meets modern e-commerce.
Emotion First: Trust, Speed, and Durability.
Content is King: Parts specs and prices are the heroes.
Zoom In: High fidelity details for parts.
Negative Space: Clean lists, no clutter.
Contrast: High contrast for outdoor visibility.
anti_patterns: No 'Inter' for headings - use Barlow Condensed.
No center-aligned everything - use strong left alignment.

bento_grid.feature_card: p-6 rounded-xl border bg-white shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

buttons.primary: bg-[#1a5c38] hover:bg-[#144a2d] text-white font-bold py-3 px-6 rounded-lg transition-transform active:scale-95 shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 text-gray-900 font-semibold py-3 px-6 rounded-lg
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] hover:bg-[#128C7E] text-white font-bold py-2 px-4 rounded-full flex items-center gap-2 shadow-lg

cards.product: group relative bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:border-[#1a5c38] transition-colors duration-300
cards.category: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg hover:bg-[#1a5c38]/10 transition-colors cursor-pointer border border-transparent hover:border-[#1a5c38]
cards.seller: flex items-center p-4 bg-white border rounded-lg gap-4 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

inputs.search: h-12 md:h-14 rounded-full border-2 border-gray-200 focus:border-[#1a5c38] px-6 text-lg shadow-sm w-full transition-colors
inputs.text: h-10 rounded-md border-gray-200 focus:border-[#1a5c38] px-3 w-full

navigation.bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white border-t border-gray-200 flex justify-around p-3 md:hidden z-50
navigation.top_bar: sticky top-0 z-40 w-full bg-[#1a5c38] text-white py-3 shadow-md

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure #1a5c38 text is only on white/light grey backgrounds. Use white text on green backgrounds.
accessibility.aria_labels: All icon-only buttons must have aria-label.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind Colors: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom 'primary' color #1a5c38.
2. Install Fonts: Use @fontsource or Google Fonts for Barlow Condensed and Inter.
3. Build Layouts: Create a layout wrapper that handles the sticky header and bottom nav (mobile).
4. Use Shadcn: Customize shadcn components to match the 'rounded-lg' and 'border-gray-200' style.
5. Mock Data: Create a realistic data file for parts (Toyota, Nissan, etc.) and sellers in Camp Yabassi.
6. Mobile First: Test all views at 375px width first.
7. WhatsApp: Ensure the WhatsApp link format is correct (wa.me/237...).
8. Test IDs: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Follow the E1 persona: Functional, High Contrast, No Fluff. Use real text, no Lorem Ipsum. Be specific to Cameroon context (FCFA, Douala locations).
